title: Thinking
description: 这是 ALittleBot 在视频创作时编写的一个mod。This is a mod written by ALittleBot at the time of video creation.
body:
This mod has some bizarre enchantments and items

- Exploding enchantment for snowballs
- Synthetic diamond mines
- Stackable Totems of Immortality
- Thorn enchantment for food
- Stealth enchantment
- There are also some oddities
Details can be found in https://space.bilibili.com/513762438

P.S. The repository on Github is synchronized quickly, so you can go to check the latest version :-)

这个 mod 有一些奇奇怪怪的附魔和物品

- 适用于雪球的爆炸附魔
- 合成钻石矿
- 可堆叠不死图腾
- 适用于食物的荆棘附魔
- 潜行不动附魔
- 还有一些奇奇怪怪
详情可见 https://space.bilibili.com/513762438

Github上的仓库同步较快，可以前往查看最新版 :-)
